column1: # This CSV file describes the RNA-seq samples to be converted to Dash format.
# Each row represents one sample with a corresponding *_gene_abundance.tab file.
# - sample_id: Sample identifier that matches the *_gene_abundance.tab filename prefix
# - source: Data source (typically "YYYY Journal" or "YYYY Journal (Author)")
# - sample_name: Display name for the sample
# - description: (Optional) Detailed description of the sample
# - sample_id: Must exactly match the filename prefix (case-sensitive)
